case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS SALAS GUSTAVO ADOLFO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,432.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS GUSTAVO ADOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
